_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Identify issues or problems that can disrupt and/or degrade processing, exploitation and dissemination architecture effectiveness.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layers, tracing problems across application code, data pipelines, databases, networks, and infrastructure to identify and remediate root causes.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-A-002 (DQ, cosine: 0.544), OP-T-002 (OP, cosine: 0.526).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.540). Shared vocabulary: [identify, issues, problems]. DCWF-only terms [architecture, degrade, disrupt, dissemination, effectiveness, exploitation] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, across, application, causes, code, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.845 (P=0.850, R=0.840). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 29-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.3%). "Identify issues or problems that can disrupt and/or degrade processing, exploita" and "Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layer" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.554 ≈ STS 0.540 (gap 0.013). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [identify, issues, problems] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.3%. Shared tokens: [identify, issues, problems]. DCWF-only: [architecture, degrade, disrupt, dissemination, effectiveness, exploitation]. WIDAI-only: [ability, across, application, causes, code, data].

signals.detail: STS 0.540 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
